name: zemtik
description: ZK-attested document reading with PII anonymization for Claude Desktop. Supports PDF, DOCX, and plain text. Double-click to install.
long_description:
Zemtik reads PDF, DOCX, and plain text files with ZK-backed attestation and PII anonymization.

To read a document, ask Claude:
  'Please read /Users/yourname/Desktop/contract.pdf and summarize the parties and obligations.'

To get the full file path on macOS:
  Right-click the file in Finder → hold Option → choose Copy Pathname.

Supported formats:
  PDF (text-layer only) — max 25 MB
  DOCX — max 25 MB
  Plain text — max 10 MB

Note: Scanned PDFs (image-only, no text layer) are not supported. Use a PDF with embedded text.

--- PII Anonymization requires the Zemtik sidecar ---

PII anonymization (PERSON, ORG, LOCATION, IDs) uses the GLiNER/Presidio sidecar.
Without it, reads will fail with a sidecar error.

macOS / Linux — start Docker Desktop, then:
  docker compose --profile anonymizer up -d

Windows — PII anonymization requires either:
  1. Docker Desktop with WSL2: run the command above in WSL2 terminal.
  2. Cloud sidecar: set ZEMTIK_ANONYMIZER_SIDECAR_ADDR to your hosted endpoint
     (e.g. http://your-server:50051) in claude_desktop_config.json under env.

To disable anonymization entirely (regex only, lower accuracy):
  Set ZEMTIK_ANONYMIZER_ENABLED=false in claude_desktop_config.json.

Attestation: Every file read is cryptographically signed with BabyJubJub EdDSA and logged to ~/.zemtik/mcp_audit.db for offline verification.
